experiments.name: trees_5pp_from_paved
experiments.description: Add 5 percentage points evergreen tree cover, removing the same amount from paved cover.

experiments.name: trees_10pp_from_paved
experiments.description: Add 10 percentage points evergreen tree cover, removing the same amount from paved cover.

experiments.name: grass_5pp_from_paved
experiments.description: Add 5 percentage points grass cover, removing the same amount from paved cover.

experiments.name: water_2pp_from_paved
experiments.description: Add 2 percentage points water cover, removing the same amount from paved cover.

experiments.name: evetr_irrigation_fraction_100
experiments.description: Set evergreen tree irrigation fraction to 1.0.

experiments.name: vegetation_soil_store_300
experiments.description: Set evergreen, deciduous and grass soil-store capacity to 300.
